description: Code and data fixups applied to original objects during translation.

fixups.reason: Compile-time remap of arcade MMIO, work RAM, and display windows into Genesis shadow storage so the original startup opcodes can execute safely.
The common startup slice ends at the normal/test split, so the detailed test-mode jump is redirected to a local Genesis-side result stub instead of the original 0x000100 service program.
Normal boot continuation at 0x03B05C is temporarily replaced by a small status-write stub so the runner can return cleanly after executing the original common startup block.
